metadata.counting_method: occurrence_count = matching product catalogue records + matching functionality records from the current dataset. Product type normalization groups close wording variants into commercially meaningful offerings.

source_product_names_and_types: Full maintenance rental / full-maintenance lease equivalent
Full-service operating leasing / fleet management service

Absa Vehicle Management Solutions - Full Maintenance Lease
Eqstra - Full Maintenance Leasing
Merchant West Fleet - Full Maintenance Lease

product_records.product_type: Full maintenance rental / full-maintenance lease equivalent
Full maintenance rental / full-maintenance lease equivalent
Full-service operating leasing / fleet management service

candidates.rationale: Public catalogues sell full-maintenance lease/rental as a contractable offer, and functionality records also use it as a bundled capability.
candidates.caveat: Count combines explicit product catalogue records and functionality-level records; use as market-frequency evidence, not provider revenue sizing.
